category_sources: source_facts.description says BlazeBlogger is a CMS for the command line.
source_facts.homepage is the BlazeBlogger project homepage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is blazeblogger; homepage and package metadata use BlazeBlogger branding.
docs_sources: Official Google Code Archive preserves the original BlazeBlogger project content.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site and best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: Project man pages direct bugs and patches to code.google.com/p/blazeblogger, now preserved in Google Code Archive.
source_facts.source-archive uses Google Code archive downloads for blazeblogger.
tags_sources: Package metadata and man pages identify BlazeBlogger as Perl-based publishing tooling.
source_facts.description and current_curation.tags identify a command-line CMS for blogging.
